name: Rebirth! New Lover
short_description: Song Xuan unexpectedly traveled to ancient times, where he met several emotional partners who sincerely treated him. There are Qing'er,Xiaobai, Gu Qiuhan,Lin Miaoxian and Mingyue Rao. He had so many humorous and sweet love stories with them.
detailed_description:
【Game Introduction】

An accident plunges you into the vortex of time and space, reborn in an ancient world intertwined with prosperity and grudges. Here, you are no longer an ordinary passerby, but the chosen one by the wheel of fate, about to embark on a romantic legend intertwined with five stunning beauties!

Immersive love experience from the first perspective

Stepping into 'Rebirth! I Met a Beauty in Ancient Times', you will personally experience an unprecedented immersive love adventure. The game adopts a first person perspective, allowing you to feel as if you have traveled through time and space, experiencing every encounter and heart stirring moment with five female protagonists with different styles firsthand. Delicate emotional communication and authentic interactive reactions establish a deep emotional bond between you and the character, allowing you to feel the exclusive sweetness that belongs only to you.

Ancient and Modern Time Travel Golden Finger

As a chosen one, not only have you been reborn in ancient times, but you have also unexpectedly acquired the golden finger of modern wisdom. By utilizing this unique ability, you can showcase your skills in the ancient world, solve problems, and even change the course of history. Whether it's business operations, martial arts cultivation, or medical inheritance, your modern knowledge will become your most powerful weapon, helping you and the five female leads write a legendary chapter together.

【Character Shaping】

In the game, there are five female protagonists with distinct personalities and styles: the gentle waiting of childhood sweetheart Qing'er, the pure and innocent nature of lovely Loli Gong Xingbai, the aloof and passionate spirit of Medical Immortal Lin Miaoxian, the heroic appearance of martial arts heroine Gu Qiuhan, and the exotic charm of the Western Region dancer Mingyue Rao.

Cute - Xiao bai
"Boss, leave this matter to me, you can rest assured!"

Encountering the mountains and forests, a touch of innocence is like the morning light. Every moment spent with her was filled with laughter, joy, and unexpected surprises.

Justice- Gu Qiuhan
"The way of chivalry is... Hey, shopkeeper, why did you lose one or two of my monthly income last month?"

Sword dance in the sky, with deep emotions. How will a chivalrous woman walking in the martial arts world, with superb martial arts skills but a life of foolishness, and a naturally dull attribute, leave an indelible mark in your heart?

Sweet - Qing'er
" Xuan, can you eat this recipe? Wow, Brother Xuan, you're just a genius!"

Accompanying since childhood, our love is as deep as the sea. The girl who always wore a warm smile in your memory is now standing tall and graceful. Her eyes conceal endless tenderness and waiting for you.

Iceberg Beauty - Lin Miaoxian
"Eating everything to regulate your body, my disciple, you have great talent on the path of medicine!"

Hanging a pot to benefit the world, unparalleled in cold beauty. The highly skilled and aloof medical immortal is renowned in the martial arts world for his miraculous rejuvenation technique. Can we melt the ice and snow in her heart and embark on a compassionate love as doctors?

Enchanting - Mingyue Rao
"Xuan, I have recently choreographed a new dance, waiting for you to come and watch tonight!"

Exotic charm, stunning dance moves. Mingyue Rao, a mysterious dancer from the distant Western Regions. Her dance can captivate the soul and leave a lasting impression.


They are not only romantic partners in the game, but also key characters driving the development of the plot: each female lead has an independent storyline and emotional storyline, and every interaction with you will trigger different plot directions, making your love journey full of infinite possibilities.

【Production Team】

The team is composed of a group of inexperienced lovers, and this work carries all their fantasies about ancient style love. As the first attempt at film and interactive games, the process is tortuous and arduous. Everyone overcame numerous difficulties just to offer their full sincerity to everyone.
In order to create a good story, the editor in chief discusses the plot and filming techniques with the director every day, leading the writing team to polish the script over and over again, just to present a better work.
The work may not be perfect, and the storyline is light and enjoyable. We still hope to gain everyone's recognition and support, so that we can persevere and bring more creative works to everyone in the future.

【Follow us】

Wechat: 重生我在古代遇佳人
Weibo: 重生我在古代遇佳人
Bilibili: 重生我在古代遇佳人
